tool_classes.description: Run a shell command. Subject to PROJECT-RULES.md guardrails (no --no-verify, no main push).
Write or read compact artifact files under generated/ or .autopilot/.
Write routing decisions and execution-mode selection artifacts.
Invoke a PowerShell script under tools/ or scripts/.
Invoke an MCP server tool (Unity MCP, Claude Preview, etc.).
tool_classes.note: When mcp_passthrough is true, the relay forwards the call so both peers observe the same result.
